sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45020" key="eu)runte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρυντέον</orth>, <sense id="n45020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must dilate</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοὺς πόρους</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:10:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.10.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
